bug_fixes_verified.fix_description: Customer menu API now accepts menu_slug 'demo-maestro' and returns correct tenant data
Aljadreia has 5 tables, Alsaydaia has 3 tables
Both /api/branches and /api/customer/menu/{tenant_id} hide default branches (الفرع الرئيسي, Main Branch)
Logo URL is returned in customer menu API and displays correctly in frontend
Reports page has search button (بحث) with data-testid='search-btn'

critical_code_review_comments: All database fixes are working correctly
Customer menu API properly filters branches and returns logo
Tables are correctly assigned to their respective branches
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 47 verified all database fixes: 1) menu_slug='demo-maestro' works for customer menu API. 2) Tables are correctly distributed: Aljadreia has 5 tables (1,2,3,388,496), Alsaydaia has 3 tables (4,5,99). 3) Default branches are hidden in both /api/branches and /api/customer/menu/{tenant_id}. 4) Logo displays correctly in customer app. 5) Reports page has search button. All tests passed.
notes: جميع الإصلاحات تعمل بشكل صحيح. تطبيق الزبائن يعرض الفروع الصحيحة (Aljadreia, Alsaydaia) والشعار يظهر بشكل صحيح.
